channel.title: Vladimir B. Arion on LMI
channel.description: Recent content in Vladimir B. Arion on LMI

item.title: Heteropentanuclear Oxalato-Bridged Nd-4F (N=4, 5) Metal Complexes Withno Ligand: Synthesis, Crystal Structures, Aqueous Stability Andantiproliferative Activity
